twoFactor.backupCodeHint: Or use a backup code (8 characters)

about.title: About ResumeConverter
about.description: ResumeConverter is a solution developed by Aptea in order to support its needs for resume analysis and improvement, and export to various templates.

hero.description: Standardize, improve and tailor your resumes by client or mission. Consistent profiles, ready to send, in just minutes.
hero.suggestionText: Increase the impact of this section by using stronger action verbs.

actions.importResumeDesc: Add a new profile to the library

step1.title: Import Your Profiles
step1.description: Import your consultants' resumes in PDF, DOC, or DOCX format. Our system analyzes and standardizes them automatically.

step2.title: Optimize with AI
step2.description: Our AI analyzes each profile, provides a detailed score, and suggests targeted improvements to maximize impact.

step3.title: Adapt & Export
step3.description: Customize each profile for your missions and export them in your preferred format, ready to send.

ai.title: AI Analysis & Suggestions
ai.description: Our AI analyzes each profile, identifies areas for improvement, and provides targeted suggestions.

improvement.title: Auto-Enhancement
improvement.description: Optimize your resumes in one click with our AI that automatically rewrites and enriches each section.

scoring.title: Detailed Scoring
scoring.description: Receive comprehensive scores across multiple categories to understand each profile's strengths.

ocr.title: Smart Extraction
ocr.description: Advanced OCR technology to automatically extract text from scanned or image-based resumes.

adaptation.title: Mission Adaptation
adaptation.description: Customize each profile based on a specific job offer to maximize your chances.

templates.title: Professional Templates
templates.description: Choose from a variety of professionally designed resume templates.

resumes.title: Resume Library
resumes.subtitle: Manage and analyze your consultants' profiles
resumes.uploadFirst: Upload your first resume to get started
resumes.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this resume? This action cannot be undone.

upload.title: Resume Analyzer
upload.subtitle: Upload your resume for instant AI-powered analysis

analysis.title: Resume Analysis
analysis.suggestionsFromOriginal: These suggestions were made based on the original CV, before its automatic improvement by AI.
analysis.originalTextDescription: Content extracted from the original resume
analysis.originalTextDescriptionEditable: Edit the extracted text before improvement
analysis.improvedTextDescription: Here is the improved version of your resume by the AI
analysis.clickImproveHint: Click "Improve with AI" to enhance your resume

improve.title: Resume Improvement
improve.description: Use AI to automatically improve this resume by optimizing its structure, content and ATS score.

export.title: Resume Export
export.needsImprovementDescription: Please improve the resume first before exporting.

modal.name: Name

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long

errors.resumeNotFoundDescription: The requested resume does not exist or has been deleted.

dpo.title: DPO Contact Information
dpo.description: Configure Data Protection Officer and firm contact information for GDPR consent emails.
dpo.infoContent: This information will be used in GDPR consent request emails sent to candidates. The DPO email will be provided as the contact for exercising data protection rights.

gdpr.title: GDPR Configuration
gdpr.description: Configure automatic consent request emails for CV storage.
gdpr.confirmDisconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this Gmail account?
gdpr.info1: This Gmail account will be used to send GDPR consent requests to external candidates
gdpr.info2: Emails are sent automatically when adding an external CV
gdpr.info3: A reminder is sent after 7 days if the candidate hasn't responded

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.description: Access the interactive API documentation powered by Swagger/OpenAPI.
apiDocs.swaggerUiDescription: Interactive API explorer with all endpoints documented
apiDocs.openApiJsonDescription: Raw OpenAPI 3.0 specification in JSON format

backup.title: Database Backup
backup.description: Configure automatic database backups via FTP or SFTP.
backup.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? This will overwrite all current database data.
backup.restoreWarning: Restoring a backup will overwrite all current database data. This action is irreversible. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.
backup.tlsHelp: Explicit = like FileZilla. Implicit = direct TLS connection.

llm.title: LLM Model Configuration
llm.description: Select the OpenAI model to use for resume analysis and improvement. If not specified, the default model (gpt-4o) will be used.
llm.cvModeNominativeDescription: The improved CV will contain all personal information of the candidate (full name, contact details, etc.).
llm.cvModeAnonymousDescription: The improved CV will be anonymized: only the candidate's trigram will be displayed, without identifying personal information.

prompts.title: Prompts Configuration
prompts.description: Customize the prompts used for resume analysis and improvement. Leave empty to use default prompts.
prompts.analysisHelp: This prompt is used to analyze the resume and generate scores.
prompts.improvementHelp: This prompt is used to improve the resume based on the analysis.
prompts.matchAnalysisHelp: This prompt analyzes the match between a resume and a mission.
prompts.adaptationHelp: This prompt adapts the resume to maximize the match with the mission.

weights.title: Analysis Category Weights
weights.description: Define the importance of each category in the overall score. The sum must equal 100%.
weights.mustEqual100: The sum of weights must equal 100%

chatbot.title: Chatbot Configuration
chatbot.description: Manage the availability of the AI assistant for application users.
chatbot.enableDescription: Allows users to access the assistance chatbot to get help using the application.
chatbot.statusEnabledInfo: Users can access the chatbot via the button at the bottom right
chatbot.statusDisabledInfo: The chatbot is hidden for all users
chatbot.info1: The chatbot uses the LLM model configured in the 'LLM Model' tab
chatbot.info2: It has access to the complete user guide to provide contextual assistance
chatbot.info3: Conversations are not saved and remain private

tags.title: Tags Management
tags.subtitle: View and manage tags extracted from the resume library

mission.noDescription: No description available for this mission

exportModal.description: The adapted resume will be exported with the selected template

chatbot.title: AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: I'm here to help you
chatbot.welcomeMessage:
👋 **Hello!** I'm your AI assistant.

I can help you with:
- 📄 **Managing the resume library** (import, analysis, improvement)
- 🎯 **Creating missions** and adapting profiles
- ⚙️ **Using the features** of the application
- ❓ **Answering your questions**

How can I help you?
chatbot.errorMessage: Sorry, I couldn't process your request. Please try again.

form.title: GDPR Information

candidateName.hint: Real name of the candidate (may differ from displayed name if anonymized)

form.gdprNotice: Under GDPR, candidate consent is required to store their CV.

errors.emailRequired: Candidate email is required for external profiles

success.emailSent: An email has been sent to {{email}}

response.title: Consent Request
response.subtitle: CV Storage and Processing
response.message: {{firm}} would like to keep your CV in their talent pool to offer you relevant professional opportunities.
response.whyWeProcess: Why we store and process your CV
response.whyItem1: Keep your CV in our talent pool and contact you
response.whyItem2: Analyze your CV (extraction: skills, experience, keywords)
response.whyItem3: Improve / rephrase your CV and adapt it to opportunities
response.whyItem4: Evaluate the match between your profile and opportunities
response.automatedProcessing: These automated processes help identify suitable opportunities. They do not, by themselves, produce an automated decision concerning you.
response.storeItem1: Your CV and the information it contains
response.storeItem2: Your contact details to reach you
response.storeItem3: Analyses and scores generated by our tools
response.retentionPeriod: Retention period: 2 years maximum. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
response.rights: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, limit, object and port your data. Contact our DPO to exercise your rights.
response.footer: This form complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

errors.alreadyProcessed: This request has already been processed

success.acceptedMessage: Your CV will be kept in our talent pool.
success.refusedMessage: Your CV will be deleted from our database.
success.retentionInfo: Your data will be kept for a maximum of 2 years.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Aptea ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our Resume Converter service.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us:

items.resume: Resume and CV data uploaded for analysis and improvement
items.usage: Usage data and interaction with our services
items.technical: Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.content: We use the information we collect to:

items.service: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
items.improvement: Analyze and enhance resume content using AI
items.communication: Communicate with you about our services

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

gdpr.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

rights.access: Right to access your personal data
rights.rectification: Right to rectify inaccurate personal data
rights.erasure: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to ensure the proper functioning of our service. These cookies are necessary for authentication and security purposes.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the Resume Converter service provided by Aptea, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

description.title: Service Description
description.content: Resume Converter is an AI-powered platform designed for IT services companies (ESN) and recruitment firms. It helps manage CV databases, analyze and improve resumes, adapt CVs to specific mission contexts, and export them using various templates.

account.title: User Accounts
account.content: To use our service, you must create an account. You are responsible for:

items.security: Maintaining the security of your account credentials
items.responsibility: All activities that occur under your account

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use our service only for lawful purposes. You must not:

items.lawful: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
items.noHarm: Upload malicious content or attempt to harm the service
items.noAbuse: Abuse, harass, or discriminate against others
items.noUnauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: The service, including its original content, features, and functionality, is owned by Aptea and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

userContent.title: User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of the resumes and content you upload. By using our service, you grant us a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing the service.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that AI-generated suggestions will be accurate or suitable for your specific needs.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: Aptea shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violations of these terms. Upon termination, your right to use the service will immediately cease.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of France, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:

comments.title: Comments
comments.empty: No comments yet. Be the first to add one!
comments.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

share.notFound: File not found or link expired
share.downloadDescription: The CV file is being downloaded to your device.
share.mobileDescription: Choose how to view this CV
share.originalWarning: You are about to share the original version of this CV, not the improved version.

pipeline.description: Manage the selection process for this candidate
pipeline.addFirst: Add this candidate to a selection process
pipeline.noEntries: This candidate is not in any selection process
pipeline.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this candidate from the pipeline?
pipeline.confirmCancelInterview: Are you sure you want to cancel this interview?

backup.pageDescription: Configure automatic backups of your database to a remote FTP/SFTP server.
backup.tlsHelp: Explicit = like FileZilla. Implicit = direct TLS connection.
backup.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? This will overwrite all current database data.
backup.restoreWarning: Restoring a backup will overwrite all current database data. This action is irreversible. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.

batchUpload.title: Batch Import
batchUpload.subtitle: Upload multiple CVs at once for automatic analysis
batchUpload.improveWarning: Improvement takes longer (about 30-60 seconds per CV)
batchUpload.zipInfo: A ZIP file containing all exported CVs will be downloaded at the end of processing
batchUpload.deleteWarning: CVs will be deleted from the database after processing. This action is irreversible.
batchUpload.deleteWarningExport: CVs will be deleted from the database after export. This action is irreversible.
batchUpload.dragDrop: Drag and drop your CVs here, or click to select
batchUpload.fileTypes: PDF, DOC, DOCX • Max 50MB per file
batchUpload.gdprInfo: Batch imported CVs are treated as internal (employees). No consent request will be sent and no candidate name is recorded.
